rows.label: qev041310_MSG0001
rows.name:
Collecting cards really is a fun thing...
To think there was something in this
world more interesting than hunting![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041310_MSG0002
rows.name:
I'll collect them in secret so my
wife doesn't find out, and someday
I'll get a full completion![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041310_MSG0003
rows.name:
I love Miracolle, but... Lately I was too
hooked on it and neglected my wife, so she
got mad and confiscated my cards...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041310_MSG0004
rows.name:
Ah... but! I want the Silver Strut
Card... Hey, if you have that
card, will you give it to me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041310_MSG0005
rows.name:
Well... the only thing I can do
right now is... teach you the
"Hunting Knowledge of the Bias"...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041310_MSG0009
rows.name:
Thank you! I've wanted this one so,
so badly for the longest time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041310_MSG0010
rows.name:
The hunting knowledge passed down
since ancient times among the Bias...
I'll teach all of it to you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041310_MSG0012
rows.name:
...Yes! You're a fast learner!
With this, from today onwards
you are a Bias hunter![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041310_MSG0013
rows.name:
I see, if that's the case it's
perfectly fine. I'll just get my
hands on it through my own power![ST:wait ]
